{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324011438A282761D6E27CC8DC040"}"},"total":803},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7259823564474417975","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺不错的，爽文有脑，文笔也可以，就是和主角牵扯的女仙目前一个也没收，赶紧都收了吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690309778,"group_id":"7215457204416023564","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8a0yUqW6zaXpmrh0JXm1ofSaZ5t+cf8C+vY2QgJqIMu","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1139519592075501","user_name":"曹魏武大帝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1139519592075501","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776769059,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7215457204416023564","book_info":{"abstract":"薛恶虎，封神演义中一个龙套角色，代替道行天尊上榜的替死鬼，惨死在十绝阵中，死后被封为损福神！
　　薛山穿越洪荒封神时期，成为炮灰薛恶虎。
　　
　　此时正值阐教金仙广收门徒，自己也已经拜师道行天尊，成为阐教三代弟子！
　　眼看大劫将至，悲剧就在眼前。
　　好在，神级投资返还系统激活，只要投资，就能获得最高万倍返还！
　　在这世界上，还有比投资自己，更划算的事情吗？
　　【叮咚，恭喜宿主，投资自身玉清仙法，触发百倍返还，获得九转元功！】
　　【叮咚，恭喜宿主，投资自身蟠桃一枚,，触发千倍返还，获得极品先天灵根蟠桃母灵根！】
　　【叮咚，恭喜宿主，投资自身混元珠，触发万倍返还，获得混沌至宝混沌珠！】
　　........
　　既有系统傍身，不如先证道混元之境，超脱洪荒，那时，莫说封神，便是阐教教主之位，也能坐上一坐。
　　我薛恶虎，也是有追求的。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/162ba73f5cc46c2d8f4c7270bd479809","author":"网游鱼神","author_id":"","book_id":"7215457204416023564","book_name":"封神：开局成了阐教，三代炮灰！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7025人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7215459621631328801","read_count":"7025","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1012277"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"490","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d4270bf7439bdc9dc0ae1828dca7e98b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779470078&x-signature=U67vzaCPLCW67plOD5R5zt%2F9QFk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2784400010381119","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.6155163e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324011438A282761D6E27CC8DC040"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"r
